allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./index.json'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('systems count:', d.systems?.length\); console.log\('materials count:', d.materials?.length\); console.log\('regions count:', d.regions?.length\); console.log\('first 3 systems:', d.systems?.slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('constellation_region_map sample:', Object.entries\(d.constellation_region_map\).slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('system_constellation_map sample:', Object.entries\(d.system_constellation_map\).slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('system_planets sample:', Object.entries\(d.system_planets\).slice\(0,2\)\);")
